text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shoes? Check. Outfit? Check. Pocket clover?
Check!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My ears and tail are even more lustrous than
usual. Let's see, what else?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as there are passionate cheers,
everything should unfold swimmingly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm excited... and perfectly itching to go! ♪
choice_data_list: You can do it! Go, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ♪ It's time to answer those cheering
fans by winning this race!
